nasb.text: Moab has been put to shame, for it has been shattered. Wail and cry out; Declare by the Arnon That Moab has been destroyed.

esv.text: Moab is put to shame, for it is broken; wail and cry! Tell it beside the Arnon, that Moab is laid waste.

cnv.text: 摩押蒙受羞辱，因為它已被毀滅了。 你們要哀號喊叫， 要在亞嫩河宣告： ‘摩押毀滅了。’

ccb.text: 你们会得知摩押沦陷了， 她羞愧难当。 你们哀伤痛哭吧！ 你们要在亚嫩河边宣告， ‘摩押灭亡了！’
